reasons: Refused: Threads write apply requires explicit no-snapshot approval until this command saves real before-state before provider writes, local token writes, demo/job writes, or receipt output

before_state.reason: This source tool can build and review Threads write plans, but it does not yet save operation-specific before-state or provider backup data before applying them.

plan.command: threads-api-tool --output json --apply posts create-text --threads-user-id demo-user --text Draft

rollback.notes: No built-in rollback, backups, snapshots, or provider restore are available in this runtime. Treat current Threads write families as irreversible_and_clearly_labeled and use the saved plan and refusal output for manual follow-up only.

verification_plan.required_before_live_write: Add command-specific before-state or provider-backup support before allowing apply.
steps: Confirm no Threads provider write endpoint was called.
Confirm no local token file, demo/job receipt, or write output was created by the write flow.
Confirm no successful write receipt was emitted.
